text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's annual summer camp has begun, and
Yaeno Muteki makes it clear she's eager to
achieve her goal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Mejiro Ardan and Sakura Chiyono O
are even more fired up than usual. This is shaping
up to be a productive summer camp.
